name: financial_compliance
description: EU AML/KYC compliance rules for transaction monitoring. Flags high-risk transactions based on fraud probability, transaction amount, and merchant type.
author: Jorge Martinez

rules.name: high_risk
rules.description: Flag any transaction with >90% fraud probability and amount exceeding $10,000

rules.name: wire_alert
rules.description: Flag wire transfers exceeding $50,000 for enhanced due diligence

rules.name: velocity_check
rules.description: Flag medium-high risk transactions for velocity pattern analysis

models.name: fraud_detector
models.description: High-accuracy fraud detection model — 3 input features (amount, merchant_type_encoded, hour_of_day)

models.name: fraud_fast
models.description: Low-latency fraud screening — trades accuracy for 10x speed
